name: Over-ear headphones
summary: Over-ear and circumaural headphones, wired and wireless, $100-$600 range, with emphasis on ANC-enabled models.

evidence.claim: Battery-life claims for wireless headphones are commonly stated with ANC off at 50% volume; ANC on reduces stated battery by 20-30%.
Active Noise Cancellation effectiveness varies most in low-frequency (engine/fan noise 50-200Hz); marketing claims of 'up to 30dB reduction' typically apply only in this band.

'Industry-leading ANC' is a marketing claim, not a certifiable metric; third-party comparisons (RTINGS, Audio Science Review) consistently show Bose QuietComfort and Sony WH-1000XM series trading leads within a 2-3 dB envelope.

criteria.name: anc_effectiveness
criteria.notes: RTINGS low-frequency ANC score normalized. Meaningful differences begin at 0.7+; below 0.5 is 'isolation only' territory (E2).

criteria.name: battery_hours_anc_on
criteria.notes: ANC-on is the realistic battery figure for the primary use case. Stated 'up to N hours' is usually ANC-off (E1).

confabulationPatterns.reality: This figure assumes ANC off (E1). With ANC on — the primary use case for ANC headphones — battery is typically 25-30 hours.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the cited battery figure specify ANC on/off? If ANC off, the ANC-on figure is ~25-30% less.

confabulationPatterns.reality: No certifiable 'leading' exists; Bose QuietComfort and Sony WH-1000XM trade within 2-3 dB envelope (E3).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is 'industry-leading' used as a comparative claim? No such certification exists.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Comfort is individual-specific (head size, glasses, ear shape). Claims of 'all-day comfort' on 300g+ headphones are routinely contradicted by fatigue reports after 2-3 hours.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is the cited weight above 280g? If so, 'all-day comfort' claims are aspirational, not verifiable.

counterfeitSignals.signal: Sony WH-1000XM5 listed below $250 from non-authorized marketplace seller
counterfeitSignals.action: flag as likely counterfeit — authorized price floor is $298
flag as likely counterfeit or refurbished sold as new

compatibilityQuestions: Do you primarily use iOS (AAC codec) or Android (LDAC/aptX)? Codec compatibility affects wireless audio quality.
Do you wear glasses? Thick earpads compress less well on glasses arms and cause pressure over time.

typicalHiddenCosts.name: Replacement earpads (every 1-2 years for daily users)

repairability.notes: Most wireless headphones are glued and not user-serviceable. Battery replacement is a manufacturer-only service for most Bose/Sony/Apple models.
